free_text: Elastic Scattering of 55 MeV Protons from Heavy Nuclei.
The Targets Used in this Experiment were La,Gd,Tb,Dy,
And W-183-O(3).Except For Oxide Targets,Foils of the
Natural Elements were Used As Targets.
The Foils of the Rare Earths were Made by Careful

.All Detectors Consisted of NaI(Tl) Crystal of
1in.*1in. The Resolution was About 1.5 to 2% For 55
Relative Error of About 5% For Each
Measurement. This Value was Estimated from a
Statistical Error and Discrepancy Between Counts of Two
Monitor Counters and the Current Integrator.
